description_long: This is a robust, rectangular metal toolbox with a red exterior and a black worktop surface, bordered by a wooden or brass trim. The front features multiple drawers of varying sizes, each with a round metallic knob, and some drawers are partially open, revealing their storage function. The top surface is scattered with various hand tools, including wrenches, screwdrivers with blue handles, a hammer, and a large square, indicating its use in mechanical or repair work. The sides of the toolbox have additional mounted tools and hooks, with one side displaying a hammer and several wrenches hanging from hooks. The overall construction appears industrial, with visible wear and metallic edges, suggesting durability and frequent use. No visible brand logos or external labels are present, and the toolbox is designed to be a stationary workbench with integrated storage.
description: A sturdy red metal toolbox with multiple drawers, a black worktop, and various hand tools scattered on top and mounted on the sides. It features metallic trim, visible wear, and is designed for heavy-duty use in workshops or garages.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red metal panel, metallic trim, and the black worktop with tools visible on top; no drawers or handles are visible from this angle.
description_view_1: Front view displaying five drawers of different sizes, some partially open, with metallic knobs and a variety of hand tools laid out on the worktop.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing mounted hooks with wrenches and a hammer, as well as the black worktop with tools; a drawer is partially open on this side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain red metal panel with the black worktop and tools visible on top; no drawers, handles, or hooks are visible from this angle.
attribute_handle_type: Fixed cylindrical metal handles on the drawers, with round metallic knobs for pulling; no visible ergonomic or folding features for carrying the entire toolbox.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Simple round metallic knobs on drawers, likely with an internal sliding or friction latch; no visible keyholes or locking mechanisms.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Five front-facing drawers of varying sizes arranged in two rows, with some drawers partially open; additional hooks and holders for tools mounted on the sides; all compartments appear fixed.
